历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Physics Category main campus was approximately 7672 → 4655 → 5963 → 10972 → 16625. After a brief peak in 2022, it has continuously declined, with a cumulative drop of about 11,970 places over the past three years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 16,625, showing a clear downward trend. Provincial Physics Category (including medical) enrollment plans: 1,049 in 2021, 1,056 in 2022, 1,054 in 2023, 1,085 in 2024, and 1,069 in 2025. In 2026, the Physics Category has 755 places plus 157 for medical, totaling 912, a reduction of about 157 places (-14.7%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it was 26th in 2021–2022, 24th in 2023–2025, and 25th in 2026, consistently in the national top 25, indicating a very high level. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety, school management, and admission cutoff anomalies. In 2025, the reputation was somewhat negative (abnormal admission cutoffs). Its Douyin popularity ranks 5th overall (high heat), with high exposure but coexisting negative signals, which somewhat suppresses application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 14 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, Ecology A, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Mathematics A-, Law A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Sociology A-, and Marxist Theory A-, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with Xiamen University's Engineering Experimental Classes (AI and Computer, Integrated Circuits and Electronic Information). In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in the province is 267,900. Xiamen University is located in Xiamen City, Fujian Province, and is the only 985 university in the province. Its provincial enrollment proportion has historically been high (1,049 in Physics Category and 223 in History Category in 2021), leading to strong local application willingness and obvious regional advantages.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous decline in historical rankings, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-14.7%), and the approximately 6.2% increase in provincial examinees, competition has notably intensified. However, the clearly negative reputation in 2026 may partially suppress application enthusiasm. Based on the 2025 baseline of 16,625, and accounting for the growth in examinee numbers and the offsetting effect of negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14,960, with a range of 14,460–15,460.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Statistics (including Economic Statistics, Statistics, Data Science)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI and Computer, including Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering)
- Accounting (Accounting, Finance, Auditing, including Dual Bachelor's Degree Programs)
- Law (including Foreign-Related Rule of Law Talent Base Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuits and Electronic Information, including Electronic Information Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, Microelectronics, etc.)
- Economics (including Finance, Fiscal Studies, Taxation, International Economics and Trade, Economics)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Intelligent Manufacturing)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Engineering and Materials)
- Architecture (Human Settlement Science and Innovation)
- Public Administration (including Political Science and Administration, Administrative Management, International Politics)
- Management Science and Engineering (including Management Science, E-commerce)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 14,460–15,460, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 14,460), you can prioritize top-tier majors such as Statistics, AI and Computer, and Accounting. If your ranking is near the upper bound (around 15,460), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes and Economics, with Tier 3 Chemical Engineering and Materials as a stable safety option.

The 2026 plan is 190, a reduction of 49 students (-20.5%) compared to 2025, a substantial contraction that intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. Ranked 25th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, firmly among the top institutions nationwide. Its 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety, school management, and admission gaps. On Douyin, it ranks 5th in overall popularity (high heat), with high exposure but coexisting negative signals. Disciplines include Law A-, Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Sociology A-, and Marxist Theory A-, highlighting strong humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is moderately recommended, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, and Journalism & Communication is clearly discouraged. Xiamen University is the only 985 university in the province, with a stable proportion of History Category enrollment, and local candidates have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop in 2025 rankings, a 20.5% reduction in History Category enrollment in 2026, and an approximately 6.3% increase in examinees, competition intensifies. prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 厦门大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家『985工程』和『211工程』重点建设高校，入选国家『双一流』建设高校名单。作为福建省唯一的985综合性大学，其医学学科依托 学校强大的理学和生命科学基础，在省内具有极高的认可度和影响力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续攀升，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。厦门大学地处经济发达的沿海城市厦门，地理位置优越，对省内考生吸引力强。2026年医 学类招生计划缩减，进一步加剧了竞争态势，预计录取位次将较2025年有所上升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动规律、2026年招生计划大幅缩减以及医学类专业持续高热度的背景，预测2026年厦门大学医学类最低录取位次约为14203名，位次区间为13919至14487名。较20 25年的16625名显著上升（更难进），反映缩招带来的竞争加剧效应。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Xiamen University's medical category in Fujian Province have fluctuated significantly over the past five years: 16,670 in 2021, 17,799 in 2022, a sharp rise to 7,608 in 2023, maintaining a high of 7,775 in 2024, and dropping to 16,625 in 2025 due to an enrollment plan expansion from 145 to 213 students (an increase of about 47%). In 2026, the medical category enrollment plan is reduced to 157 students, a decrease of 56 students from 2025 (a reduction of about 26.3%), bringing the enrollment scale back to near the 2021-2022 level. Supply-demand dynamics tighten, and the admission ranking is expected to rise significantly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and is included in the national 'Double First-Class' construction university list. As the only 985 comprehensive university in Fujian Province, its medical disciplines rely on the university's strong foundation in science and life sciences, enjoying extremely high recognition and influence within the province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology experiencing particularly intense competition. Xiamen University is located in the economically developed coastal city of Xiamen, with a superior geographical location, making it highly attractive to students within the province. The reduction in the 2026 medical category enrollment plan further intensifies the competitive situation, and the admission ranking is expected to increase compared to 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the fluctuation patterns of historical rankings, the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the sustained high popularity of medical majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Xiamen University's medical category in 2026 will be approximately 14,203, with a ranking range of 13,919 to 14,487. This represents a significant increase (harder to enter) compared to the 16,625 in 2025, reflecting the intensified competition due to enrollment reduction.

- Science Experimental Class (Medicine and Life Sciences Dual Bachelor's Degree Innovation Experimental Class) (01) (Including Basic Medicine)

- Science Experimental Class (Life Sciences and Medical Health) (For Zhangzhou)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to use Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 as a reach target, and Tier 3 as a safe backup. The rankings for special programs targeting Xiamen and Zhangzhou are usually lower than the provincial unified recruitment, so eligible candidates can prioritize them.
